title: Char Siu Bao
description: A twist on traditional steamed buns filled with char siu-glazed pork. This recipe is gluten-free and features a tender, flavorful filling.
instructions: In a large pan, cook the bacon over medium heat until crispy. Set aside.
In a blender or food processor, combine the char siu, xenial, molten, chinese, and soy sauce. Blend until smooth.
Add the cooked bacon, scallions, and cooked lentils to the blender. Blend until combined.
Preheat a steamer basket with boiling water.
Place the steamer buns in the steamer basket and steam for 5 minutes.
Spoon the char siu filling into the steamer buns.
Brush the tops of the buns with sesame oil and serve.
Cook the filling in a pan over medium heat until heated through.
Assemble the buns by spooning the cooked filling into them.
